title: Storm's Bedwars Wool
description: This texture pack makes the wool cleaner and nicer looking to play in bedwars. Thank you for downloading this texture pack!
body: **_🟦 Enhanced Wool improves only Minecraft’s wool blocks with smoother textures, cleaner colors, and subtle detail, giving them a more polished look while leaving every other block completely untouched. Perfect for builds, interiors, and pixel art without changing the vanilla feel! 🟦_**
